comment: Previous-green-main anchor for the skip-tracking dashboard (T4.3). CI fails if manifest.unauthorized_skips.length > baseline_unauthorized_skips. Update this baseline only when a new long-term skip is intentionally absorbed: (1) add the entry to SKIP_ALLOWLIST with issue + until, (2) increment baseline_unauthorized_skips here, (3) commit with a rationale comment. Never auto-increment from code. Note: raw test.skip() / test.fixme() calls bypass this gate today — capture of those is planned for v0.2 (#155 phase V2.G). All 10 currently-raw test.skip() calls in the suite are pre-documented in SKIP_ALLOWLIST in skip-tracking.ts so the gate will not immediately fail when capture is extended. V2.G stage 3, items 10-11.
